feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.task_description: Add auto-install steps for River (Python) and embed (@huggingface/transformers) to install.js, with matching statusline updates
feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.approach: Add auto-install steps for River (Python) and embed (@huggingface/transformers) to install.js with idempotency checks, then update buildToolsLine() in nf-statusline.js to check global installations instead of project-local or always-shown indicators.
out_of_scope: Modifying River state file detection logic or Q-table exploration thresholds
Changing color schemes or text styling for any indicators
Adding installation steps for other dependencies or packages
Adding pre-release or version checking for River or embed packages
feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.risk_reason: Modifications to bin/install.js (core installer) and hooks/nf-statusline.js (hook file) trigger GUARDRAIL for high risk.
